name: The Quiet Fix
effect: Resolve a critical problem without ceremony. This card is considered invisible.

clauses.name: INVISIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card resolves an issue without a launch email: No one is informed it was broken.

clauses.name: ATTRIBUTION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a stakeholder later claims ownership of the resolution: This card may not contradict them.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If this card is decommissioned: The problem it solved is rediscovered within one quarter.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Does anyone know who maintains this?
